channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 21st May
item.description:
The report has already been raised and claimed fixed. But it is not. The rubbish is still all over the empty housing association property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorney Rise, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to14 athelstan gardens, 21st May
item.description:
Lime bikes parked on playing area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another joyous stroll down litter lane, 21st May
item.description:
Every day. As it ever will be, until the council do something about this and ensure the residents have sufficient waste provision OR fine / evict them if they have and don't use...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In Willesden lane. Between Christchurch rd and cavendish road., 21st May
item.description:
Dumped wardrobes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned bikes, 21st May
item.description:
Two abandoned bikes outside Orchard House. Our neighbour tripped over one of these a few weeks ago and needed to go to hospital

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Bike, 21st May
item.description:
Electric bike left around this area, propped up behind tree when last seen. Not sure which brand it is.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes callously abandoned on E8 footway, 21st May
item.description:
More Lime e-bikes are being parked illegally on the footway in Sandringham Road, despite there being a dedicated parking space just around the corner. Blind and visually impaired pedestrians can not predict or prepare for these dangerous obstructions.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Sandringham Road, Shacklewell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree blocking the street lighting and its extremely dark and frightening to pass that section, 21st May
item.description:
Tree needs cutting back now that its a health and safety night hazard not being able to see- extremely dark
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entry to Upper Hampstead Walk, 21st May
item.description:
Pothole in pavement causing difficulty for wheelchair access
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, New End, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned kitchen parts, 21st May
item.description:
2nd report

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leroy Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st May
item.description:
Flytipping near the biffa rubbish facility, trees also need trimming as well as the bushes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meridian Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree branches obstructing foot path, also the trees and bushes need maintenance, 21st May
item.description:
Fallen tree branches obstructing foot path, also the trees and bushes need maintenance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meridian Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped horse box full of rubbish, 20th May
item.description:
For over 2 months it's sat there in road.. Full of rubbish.. Dangerous to kids and traffic..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three potholes by previous repairs., 20th May
item.description:
There are three new potholes around previous repairs. One has already caused an accident when an individual stumbled on it while exiting a car. The victim sustained a minor head injury.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderslie Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General waste abandon, 20th May
item.description:
There has been a couple of general waste has been on the corner of the stairs which has been thrown. Someone has opened and throw everywhere basically.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancey Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, possible fly tipping is all over the street blocking it, 20th May
item.description:
Rubbish, possible fly tipping is all over the street blocking it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saddlers Way, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights down, 20th May
item.description:
Traffic lights out Permeant traffic lights Jct with East street and Sherman Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 20th May
item.description:
Yet again this street light is out. It works for a few weeks then stops working. There’s obviously a problem with it that is not being fixed. I’m constantly reporting it, the whole section of road and pavement is in complete darkness. Not good for pedestrian safety and vehicle security
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped matress, 20th May
item.description:
Dumped at 22.30pm by a man in a van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate graffiti daubed on bus stop signage, 20th May
item.description:
Inappropriate graffiti daubed on bus stop signage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
